heading: Chairman; Vice Chairman
label: 1203 Chairman; Vice Chairman
notes: Amendments1989—Subsec. (a). , struck out the comma after “time” in first sentence.Pub. L. 101–12, § 3(a)(4)Subsec. (c). , substituted “the Chairman and the Vice Chairman” for “the Chairman and Vice Chairman” after “both”.Pub. L. 101–12, § 3(a)(5)
Effective Date of 1989 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days following , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 101–12section 11 of Pub. L. 101–12section 1201 of this titleApr. 10, 1989
amendments: Amendments1989—Subsec. (a). , struck out the comma after “time” in first sentence.Pub. L. 101–12, § 3(a)(4)Subsec. (c). , substituted “the Chairman and the Vice Chairman” for “the Chairman and Vice Chairman” after “both”.Pub. L. 101–12, § 3(a)(5)
Effective Date of 1989 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days following , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 101–12section 11 of Pub. L. 101–12section 1201 of this titleApr. 10, 1989

children.label: a
children.text: The President shall from time to time appoint, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, one of the members of the Merit Systems Protection Board as the Chairman of the Board. The Chairman is the chief executive and administrative officer of the Board.

children.label: b
children.text: The President shall from time to time designate one of the members of the Board as Vice Chairman of the Board. During the absence or disability of the Chairman, or when the office of Chairman is vacant, the Vice Chairman shall perform the functions vested in the Chairman.

children.label: c
children.text: During the absence or disability of both the Chairman and the Vice Chairman, or when the offices of Chairman and Vice Chairman are vacant, the remaining Board member shall perform the functions vested in the Chairman.
